brief: Today's news includes a German school attack, IMF economic slowdown, and rising US-Iran tensions, while papers explore AI coding assistants and weather visualization.
news_summary: A teenager was arrested after a school attack in Germany, the IMF projects slower global growth, and conflicts continue in the Middle East and Ukraine.
papers_summary: Papers cover AI-enhanced coding tools, interactive weather model explanations, and EEG-based speech decoding.

todays_image.caption: A desk from a school named "Hope" becomes a haunting symbol of how such spaces can turn from places of learning into sites of violence.
todays_image.source_name: National Museum of African American History and Culture
todays_image.title: Desk from the Hope School
